case_title: TRM FOURTH AVENUE VS ROUSE, SUSAN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ROUSE, SUSAN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27244, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRM FOURTH AVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUSE, SUSAN $629.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $681.00, IF AND ONLY IF TRM ELECTS AS ITS OWN EXPENSE TO REMOVE AND REPLACE THE WINDOW INSTALLED BY SUSAN ROUSE WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT. TRM SHALL GIVE WRITTEN NOTICE OF THE DATE OF REMOVAL AT LEAST 3 DAYS PRIOR TO THE DATE THE WORK IS TO BE PERFORMED. SUCH WORK OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
